name: @easynodexyz/mcp-x402
description: MCP server for AI agents to purchase VPS/Node products via Easy Node's x402 API with USDC on Base

EASYNODE_PRIVATE_KEY.title: Private Key
EASYNODE_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Wallet private key for signing x402 payments (0x-prefixed hex)

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List available VPS and blockchain node products with USDC pricing

tools.name: create_order
tools.description: Purchase a VPS or blockchain node product using USDC on Base via x402 payment flow

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Get the status and details of an existing order by ID

tools.name: list_instances
tools.description: List all VPS and Node instances owned by the wallet

tools.name: get_instance
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific instance including decrypted connection credentials

tools.name: renew_instance
tools.description: Renew an existing VPS or Node instance subscription using USDC on Base

tools.name: update_custom_name
tools.description: Set or update the custom name of a VPS or Node instance
